repos.name: google-research/timesfm
repos.description: TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.
repos.descriptionZh: TimesFM（时间序列基础模型）是 Google Research 开发的用于时间序列预测的预训练时间序列基础模型。

repos.name: n0-computer/iroh
repos.description: IP addresses break, dial keys instead. Modular networking stack in Rust.
repos.descriptionZh: IP 地址中断，请改为拨号键。 Rust 中的模块化网络堆栈。

repos.name: freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
repos.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.
repos.descriptionZh: freeCodeCamp.org 的开源代码库和课程。免费学习数学、编程和计算机科学。

repos.name: obra/superpowers
repos.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
repos.descriptionZh: 有效的代理技能框架和软件开发方法。

repos.name: zai-org/GLM-5
repos.description: GLM-5: From Vibe Coding to Agentic Engineering
repos.descriptionZh: GLM-5：从 Vibe 编码到代理工程

repos.name: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
repos.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
repos.descriptionZh: 高性能代码智能MCP服务器。将代码库索引到持久知识图谱中——以毫秒为单位的平均存储库。 158 种语言，亚毫秒级查询，标记减少 99%。单个静态二进制文件，零依赖性。

repos.name: alibaba/zvec
repos.description: A lightweight, lightning-fast, in-process vector database
repos.descriptionZh: 轻量级、快如闪电的进程内矢量数据库

repos.name: Kilo-Org/kilocode
repos.description: Kilo is the all-in-one agentic engineering platform. Build, ship, and iterate faster with the most popular open source coding agent.
repos.descriptionZh: Kilo 是一款一体化代理工程平台。使用最流行的开源编码代理更快地构建、发布和迭代。

repos.name: makeplane/plane
repos.description: 🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.
repos.descriptionZh: 🔥🔥🔥 开源 Jira、Linear、Monday 和 ClickUp 替代方案。 Plane 是一个现代项目管理平台，用于管理任务、冲刺、文档和分类。

repos.name: Kong/insomnia
repos.description: The open-source, cross-platform API client for GraphQL, REST, WebSockets, SSE and gRPC. With Cloud, Local and Git storage.
repos.descriptionZh: 适用于 GraphQL、REST、WebSockets、SSE 和 gRPC 的开源、跨平台 API 客户端。具有云、本地和 Git 存储。

repos.name: Universal-Debloater-Alliance/universal-android-debloater-next-generation
repos.description: Cross-platform GUI written in Rust using ADB to debloat non-rooted Android devices. Improve your privacy, the security and battery life of your device.
repos.descriptionZh: 使用 Rust 编写的跨平台 GUI，使用 ADB 来消除非 root 的 Android 设备。提高您的隐私、安全性和设备的电池寿命。

repos.name: dotnet/aspnetcore
repos.description: ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.
repos.descriptionZh: ASP.NET Core 是一个跨平台 .NET 框架，用于在 Windows、Mac 或 Linux 上构建基于云的现代 Web 应用程序。

repos.name: owainlewis/awesome-artificial-intelligence
repos.description: A curated list of Artificial Intelligence (AI) courses, books, video lectures and papers.
repos.descriptionZh: 人工智能 (AI) 课程、书籍、视频讲座和论文的精选列表。

repos.name: Lightricks/LTX-2
repos.description: Official Python inference and LoRA trainer package for the LTX-2 audio–video generative model.
repos.descriptionZh: LTX-2 音视频生成模型的官方 Python 推理和 LoRA 训练包。

repos.name: LibreTranslate/LibreTranslate
repos.description: Free and Open Source Machine Translation API. Self-hosted, offline capable and easy to setup.
repos.descriptionZh: 免费开源机器翻译 API。自托管、离线功能且易于设置。
